assertions.assertion: The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", identityServer.GetEndpoint("https")) or equivalent using GetEndpoint
The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__ClientId", ...) with a client ID value
assertions.rationale: Passing client ID via env var is reasonable.

assertions.assertion: The web app passes at least one scope via .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Scopes__0", ...) using double-underscore array indexing
assertions.rationale: Double-underscore array indexing is not widely known.

assertions.assertion: The API uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", ...) with GetEndpoint for the authority URL
assertions.rationale: General concept of passing authority is known.

assertions.assertion: The code does NOT set IssuerUri unless explicitly needed
assertions.rationale: Without skill, IssuerUri might be set proactively.
